name: oloye-skills
description: Free, practical Claude Code skills from Oloye. The AI Automation Guy. Install once, get every skill as it ships.

plugins.name: site-builder
plugins.description: Build a high-converting one-page website with a real, committed design direction, not generic AI slop. Interviews you first, commits a design system tied to your business, then outputs a single self-contained index.html you can open and host. No frameworks, no build step.

plugins.name: invoice-chaser
plugins.description: Turn your unpaid invoices into polite, firm chase emails drafted straight into Gmail, escalating by how overdue each one is. Get paid faster without the awkward. Drafts only, never auto-sends.

plugins.name: review-replies
plugins.description: Turn your customer reviews into on-brand replies in seconds. Paste your Google reviews and get a ready-to-post reply for each, thanking the good and handling the bad gracefully, in your business's voice.

plugins.name: post-pack
plugins.description: Turn one idea or voice note into a week of ready-to-post social media captions in your voice, with hashtags, optionally scheduled to your channels. Fill your content calendar in 5 minutes.
